_comment: Branch ruleset for `master`. Imported once via `gh api repos/amiwrpremium/go-derive/rulesets --method POST --input .github/rulesets/branch-master.json`. Update in place: `gh api repos/.../rulesets/<id> --method PUT --input ...`. The ruleset supersedes the legacy branch-protection block in `.github/settings.yml`. Required-check names match jobs in `.github/workflows/ci.yml` (`required` rollup), `lint.yml`, `codeql.yml`, `gosec.yml`, and `pr-title.yml`. Conventional-commit format on the squash commit is covered by `pr-title.yml` (validates the PR title) plus `settings.yml`'s `squash_merge_commit_title: PR_TITLE` — the GitHub-Enterprise-only `commit_message_pattern` rule is intentionally absent because it requires GHAS, and the pr-title + squash-merge combination already covers it on free plans.
name: master-branch-protection

bypass_actors._comment: Repo admin role — GitHub's built-in admin role ID is 5. Lets the maintainer push emergency hotfixes directly when CI gates aren't appropriate (e.g. broken master, security patch). Day-to-day changes still go through PR.
